notes: Bulk-generation-first candidate created with built-in imagegen. QA, legal/license review, final approval, and runtime integration deferred until all candidates exist.
final_prompt: Use case: stylized-concept; Asset type: enemy intent icon set for Orbwalker; Primary request: production candidate compact HUD icon sheet for enemy intent states. Subject: four icons in a clean 2x2 sheet: attack sword/claw, block shield, attack-plus-block crossed weapon and shield, unknown/warning intent. Dark fantasy metal and gem accents. Style/medium: polished stylized 2D UI icons, extremely readable at small HUD scale. Composition/framing: 2x2 sheet, equal-size icons, centered, transparent-background cutout feel, no labels. Lighting/mood: clear tactical signal, high contrast. Color palette: attack red/orange, block blue/silver, combined purple/gold, warning amber. Constraints: no readable text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no gore, no casino imagery, avoid decorative clutter.
